Help centre header.

Graphic asset specifications

Each graphic asset in your store listing has a specific format, size, and resolution requirement. Following these specs ensures your listing renders correctly on every supported device.

Phone screenshots

Up to 8 screenshots per listing. JPEG or 24-bit PNG (no alpha). Minimum dimension 320 px; maximum dimension 3,840 px. Aspect ratio between 16:9 and 9:16 inclusive.

Feature graphic

Required. JPEG or 24-bit PNG (no alpha). 1,024 px wide × 500 px tall. Avoid text near the edges — the asset is cropped on smaller form factors.

Footer noise.
